chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1765 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 19.11.2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner submits that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, therefore, under instructions, does not press the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
